vocab.meaning: sự nhiệt huyết không kiềm chế
vocab.example: I used to collect rare stamps with unbridled enthusiasm, spending every penny of my pocket money on them.

vocab.meaning: sở thích nhất thời, nhanh đến nhanh đi
vocab.example: While I had a fleeting interest in playing the violin, my passion for drawing was far more enduring.
My parents tried to nurture a talent for swimming by enrolling me in professional classes at a very young age.

vocab.meaning: người đam mê sở thích một cách công khai/tự hào
vocab.example: I was an avowed hobbyist when it came to model airplanes, with my bedroom ceiling covered in them.

vocab.meaning: nguồn cảm hứng/tia sáng sáng tạo
vocab.example: Building elaborate structures with LEGO blocks really ignited a creative spark that led me towards architecture.

vocab.meaning: hoàn toàn mang tính giải trí
vocab.example: My involvement in the local football club was purely recreational, as I never intended to go professional.

vocab.meaning: đam mê mãnh liệt chiếm trọn tâm trí
vocab.example: Reading fantasy novels became an all-consuming passion that often kept me up until the early hours of the morning.

vocab.meaning: những cuộc phiêu lưu/trò nghịch ngợm thời trẻ
vocab.example: Most of my childhood hobbies revolved around youthful escapades in the woods behind our house.

vocab.meaning: sự tập trung kiên định như đá
vocab.example: I would sit with a whinstone-steady focus for hours while assembling intricate jigsaw puzzles.

vocab.meaning: để lại một di sản (ám chỉ thói quen từ nhỏ ảnh hưởng đến hiện tại)
vocab.example: My childhood interest in gardening bequeathed a legacy of environmental awareness that I still carry today.
